name: UPTAKE PATTERN IN BONE LESIONS
definition: Looser zones = pseudofractures Milkman fractures (most characteristic) radiotracer accumulation at periphery of bone lesion with little activity at its center decreased radiotracer uptake
dominant_finding: focal intense uptake ← site of brown tumors
distribution: randomly distributed focal sites of intense activity
discriminating_features: randomly distributed focal sites of intense activity
focal intense uptake ← site of brown tumors
diffusely increased activity in bones: particularly prominent in axial skeleton, calvarium,

general: randomly distributed focal sites of intense activity

"absent kidney" sign = little / no activity in kidneys but good visualization of urinary
